Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4200 "IMPACT-8000-4200" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Impact.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $8000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $8020 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
Also patched the JSR $FFE4 instruction at $424E to be JMP $4384 instead to skip the question asking about loading predefined screens.
